Handles Pebble watch messages, implements a watch face, and includes project configuration and build rules.


## Files
- **[app.js](app.js.md)**: Handles incoming messages from a Pebble watch and logs the message data.
- **[index.js](index.js.md)**: Implements a Pebble watch face that displays time and date, and sends a message to the phone.
- **[package.json](package.json.md)**: Configuration file for a Pebble app project with metadata and main script paths.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Default build rules for compiling a Pebble application with platform-specific configurations.
